args.text: Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api running v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we've issued a refund of $19.99 to your order ORD-5501 for a duplicate billing charge. We're sorry for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three affected orders from the 12 May duplicate-charge incident have been refunded and customers notified: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
